context: Tests the ability to diagnose and repair a broken canvas file with a duplicate node ID and a dangling edge reference.

checklist.name: Duplicate ID resolved
checklist.description: The two nodes that shared the id deadbeefdeadbeef now have distinct IDs

checklist.name: Dangling edge fixed
checklist.description: The edge that referenced toNode 9999999999999999 has been removed or updated to point to a valid node ID

checklist.name: All IDs unique
checklist.description: Every id value across nodes and edges in the output is unique — no duplicates remain

checklist.name: Valid JSON output
checklist.description: The corrected canvas content is syntactically valid JSON with no parse errors
